LightningMessageChannel.description: Selection + refresh bus for the modularized Delta Term Builder tiles (negotiation context, terms rail, term workspace). Carries small selection keys and "something changed" pulses; each tile self-loads its own data from Apex.

lightningMessageFields.description: Message discriminator: context | termSelected | termsChanged | linesChanged | fareAdded | contractCreated
Id of the negotiation Quote currently in scope
Id of the Account for the current negotiation
Id of the Term (root line) selected in the rail
Default negotiation start date in YYYY-MM-DD format
Default negotiation end date in YYYY-MM-DD format
Name of the tile that published the message, used to suppress self-echo
